g.text: Linux CFS Bandwidth Controller Algorithm (50% Quota Allocation)

ul.li: Quota Monitoring: tg->cfs_b.runtime is the global pool. Local cfs_rq->runtime_remaining is pulled from the global pool in batches (usually 5ms).
Throttling Path: update_curr() -> account_cfs_rq_runtime() -> __account_cfs_rq_runtime(). If runtime_remaining < 0, the cfs_rq is throttled.
Refill Path: The period_timer fires, resets cfs_b->runtime to quota, and calls distribute_cfs_runtime() to wake up throttled queues.
High Resolution Timers: Uses hrtimer for precise period boundary enforcement.

tr.td: Sum of execution time in update_curr
